universities.name: Tribhuvan University (TU)
universities.scholarship_policy: 45% constitutional reserved quota at all affiliated colleges; merit scholarships at constituent campuses; mandatory 2 community school scholarship seats per TU-affiliated BBA/BBS college

universities.name: Kathmandu University (KU)
universities.scholarship_policy: 1 scholarship per 24 fee-paying students (~4%); need + merit (CGPA 3.3+); Geomatics govt scholarship (33% fee, 21 seats, 3/province); female engineering scholarships (Jasutara, E&T fund)

universities.name: Pokhara University (PU)
universities.scholarship_policy: Largest scholarship provider – 1,328 bachelor scholarship seats (501 Sci&Tech, 788 Mgmt, 39 Humanities); 20% constituent / 10% affiliated; written exam scholarship.pu.edu.np

universities.name: Purbanchal University
universities.scholarship_policy: 45% reserved quota; Everest Foundation BBA scholarship; Faculty of Law scholarship; program-specific scholarships

universities.name: Mid-Western University (MWU)
universities.scholarship_policy: 45% reserved quota; government scholarship seats; focus on Karnali region access

universities.name: Far-Western University (FWU)
universities.scholarship_policy: 45% reserved quota; remote area scholarship priority; focus on Sudurpashchim access

universities.name: Patan Academy of Health Sciences (PAHS)
universities.scholarship_policy: Rural bonding scholarship (full fees + stipend with rural service bond); community scholarship seats; MEC quota

universities.name: Foreign Universities (UK/US/Malaysia) – Nepal Campus
universities.scholarship_policy: Institution-level merit scholarships; no government quota; limited seats
